## FetchAndSaveHooks.onError() method

Asynchronous callback executed when either the [FetchAndSaveHooks.fetch()](./x-components.fetchandsavehooks.fetch.md) or [FetchAndSaveHooks.onSuccess()](./x-components.fetchandsavehooks.onsuccess.md) methods fail.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
onError?(error: unknown): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  error | unknown | The error that triggered this callback. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
